when_to_use: Zero-fee ACH and bank payments for B2B AR automation
Automating AP/AR workflows with custom payment API
Reducing per-transaction fees with bank network payments

pros: Decent API for custom payment flows
Strong NetSuite and Sage ecosystem fit
cons: Best fees require buyers to adopt Paystand network
review.verdict: Interesting zero-fee angle for B2B payments plus AR/AP — powerful if your network adopts it.
review.best_for: North American B2B companies on NetSuite/Sage wanting lower payment fees and automation.
review.not_for: Teams outside North America or those with buyers unwilling to onboard to a payment network.
